caption: A screen recording shows a web browser open to a page with a dark background featuring a conceptual mind map. In the center of the map, a blue box contains the text "TRIP OVER THE TRUTH" followed by a list: "1) a clear insight; 2) Compressed to form, and 3) discovered by the audience itself." Various circular icons and labels like "Idea" and "Invisible Truth" are connected to this central box by blue lines. In the top right corners of the first and second frames, a small video feed shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt. The browser tabs at the top include titles such as "Truth & Learning by Systemantics" and "Future of Society by Systemantics." Across the sequence, the layout of the mind map remains static, and the man in the video feed remains in a similar position, though he is absent from the third and fourth frames.
